item.description:
### Changed - **A more reliable connection to your iPhone.** Perch now keeps the companion link healthy — reclaiming stalled connections and holding steady ones open — so the fleet on your phone stays live and in sync. - **Version-aware pairing.** The Mac and the iPhone app now check they're on compatible versions and tell you to update if they've drifted apart, instead of quietly showing stale data.
### Security - **Your session data is more private.** Perch now keeps its own runtime data in a private, app-owned location (out of the shared `~/.claude` folder), tightens file permissions, and validates every session identifier before it touches disk — so session details stay yours on a shared Mac.
